MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROSENDIN ELECTRIC, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
Katherine Allen, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltf & opposing party; Kelly L. Cowan, Esq. of Sinunu Bruni LLP 362-9700 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE FROM DEFENDANT AS TO WHAT IT KNEW. THE BIRKNER DECLARATION, ASSUMING IT IS ADMISSIBLE FAILS TO DO SO. PARAGRAPHS 2 AND 3 OF THE BIRKNER DECLARATION DO NOT SET FORTH SUFFICIENT FOUNDATIONAL FACTS FOR THE COURT TO FIND THAT HE IS QUALIFIED TO GIVE EACH OF THE OPINIONS EXPRESSED. In addition, the Court granted summary adjudication as to strict liability, false representation, and premises/contractor liability. Plaintiff to prepare proposed form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
